title: ExcpoUI
description: The UI resource pack created by my friend was published by me on Modrinth.
body:
# Overall Description
This resource pack enhances the UI effects of Minecraft's vanilla version and introduces a new Panorama.
For example, the damaged health points appear transparent.
# Specific Version Notes
## Release 1.0
The official release of this resource pack is now available, compatible with versions 1.20.4 to 1.21.9 (*Compatibility details provided by my friend).
